zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Calverley於1545年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親Sir William Calverly45歲，母親Elizabeth Sneyde37歲。她於1562年與Sir Robert Hyde在英國爾卡登結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和12個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年12月21日在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Calverley于1545年出生在英国英格兰越可爾卡爾福利时，她的父亲Sir William Calverly45岁，母亲Elizabeth Sneyde37岁。她于1562年与Sir Robert Hyde在英国爾卡登结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和12个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年12月21日在英国英格兰爾斯托普特享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾斯托普特。

nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Calverley was born in 1545, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Calverly, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Sneyde, was 37. She married Sir Robert Hyde in 1562, in Carden, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 12 daughters. She died on 21 December 1624, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England: Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice Calverley est née en 1545, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Calverly, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sneyde, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Hyde en 1562, à Carden, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 12 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1624, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England: Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice Calverley 1545 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Calverly 45 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Sneyde 37. Sie hat 1562 in Carden, Cheshire, England Sir Robert Hyde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 12 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1624 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Calverley è nata il nel 1545 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Calverly, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Sneyde, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Hyde nel 1562, nel Carden, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 12 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1624, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice Calverleyが1545年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父Sir William Calverlyは45歳，母Elizabeth Sneydeは37歳であった。1562年にイギリスチェシュアイアカーデンでSir Robert Hydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼女は1624年12月21日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이 스트 톰아스
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Calverley(이)가 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Calverly(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sneyde(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1562년 영국 체실르 카든에서 Sir Robert Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 12월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice Calverley nasceu em 1545, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Calverly, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sneyde, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Hyde em 1562, em Carden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 12 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1624, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England: салисбури ст томас, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Calverley родилась в 1545 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Calverly было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sneyde, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Hyde в 1562 г. в местности карден, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 12 дочерей. Она умерла 21 декабря 1624 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, England: Salisbury St Thomas, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice Calverley nació en 1545, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Calverly, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sneyde, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Hyde en 1562, en Carden, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 12 hijas. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1624, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
